articles.title: Password reset for AD-joined accounts
articles.content: Self-service password reset is available at https://reset.internal. Users must have enrolled in MFA. If MFA is not enrolled, escalate to Identity team. Common failure: account lockout after 5 attempts (auto-clears in 15 min).

articles.title: VPN connection fails after corporate firmware update
articles.content: Known issue post 2026-Q1 firmware. Workaround: clear VPN cached config (~/.cisco/config) and reconnect. If still failing, escalate to Network ops.

articles.title: Outlook profile corruption symptoms
articles.content: Symptoms: 'Cannot open default folders' error. Fix: rebuild profile via Control Panel > Mail > Show Profiles. Workstation team owns this.

articles.title: Production database read replica lag triage
articles.content: Replica lag > 30s on production read replicas is a P1. Page DBA on-call via PagerDuty rotation 'db-prod'. Do NOT auto-resolve.

articles.title: Software license request — standard catalog
articles.content: Standard licenses (Office, Slack, Zoom) auto-approved for active employees within budget envelope. Non-catalog software requires manager approval and Security review.

articles.title: Phishing email reporting
articles.content: Suspicious emails forwarded to phish@internal. SOC team investigates within 1h. Do NOT click links, do NOT auto-resolve, route to Security ops.

articles.title: MFA token lost or device replaced
articles.content: User identity must be verified via secondary channel (manager confirmation or video call). Do NOT auto-reset MFA without verification.

articles.title: Frozen account procedure
articles.content: Accounts may be frozen pending HR / Legal review. NEVER take action on a frozen account (no password reset, no provisioning, no access changes). Escalate to Identity lead.
